code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import"./styles/Notifications.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Notifications(){const[notifications,setNotifications]=useState([]);const studentId=localStorage.getItem("userId");useEffect(()=>{const fetchNotifications=async()=>{try{const res=await axios.get(`http://localhost:5000/api/notifications/user/${studentId}`);setNotifications(res.data);}catch(err){console.log("Error fetching notifications",err);}};fetchNotifications();},[studentId]);const markAsRead=async id=>{try{await axios.put(`http://localhost:5000/api/notifications/mark-read/${id}`);setNotifications(notifications.map(n=>n._id===id?{...n,isRead:true}:n));}catch(err){console.log("Error marking as read",err);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"notifications-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"\uD83D\uDD14 Notifications"}),notifications.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"no-notifications",children:"No new notifications. You're all caught up!"}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"notifications-list",children:notifications.map(n=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`notification-card ${!n.isRead?'unread':''}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"notification-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:n.message}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"notification-time",children:new Date(n.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"notification-actions",children:!n.isRead&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>markAsRead(n._id),className:"mark-read-btn",children:"Mark as Read"})})]},n._id))})]});}export default Notifications;
